target: addon end-to-end (addon loaded in a headless gramps GUI; addons-source <Addon>/tests/interface)
note: Baseline for the addon E2E gate (T3-addon-interface). Green by default: no addon ships tests/interface/ yet, so the runner is a no-op. As frontend addons add E2E suites, record any pre-existing reds here with `t3_baseline.py ./engine/scripts/ubuntu/run-addon-interface.sh --update`; only a NEW failure then raises §6.
